steps.title: Identify the required comparison
steps.content: The question states the student wants to compare the hardness of talc and orthoclase. This is the decisive signal: the answer must make this specific comparison using relevant information from the notes.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Orthoclase can leave visible scratches on talc, which means that orthoclase is harder than talc. directly compares orthoclase and talc, stating that orthoclase can scratch talc and is therefore harder—applying the key principle from the notes.

The other three options either describe the scale generally or compare different mineral pairs.

This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
